Therefore, based on the documented pharmacological agents listed—such as SSRIs and mood stabilizers—it follows that simvastatina lacks supported efficacy for alleviating depressive symptoms within this context.

Only well-established antidepressants such as SSRIs and mood stabilizers are directly linked to treatment of depression in the documentation.
